name: Chilhowie Public Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Chilhowie Public Courts in Chilhowie, VA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Marion Elementary School
description: Marion Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marion, VA. There are 4 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Marion Public Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Marion Public Courts in Marion, VA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
